title: Ousted Fermi CEO Calls for Special Meeting to Expand Board
title_cn: 被罢黜的费米首席执行官呼吁召开特别会议以扩大董事会规模
summary: Toby Neugebauer, the ousted leader of Fermi Inc., is calling for a special shareholder meeting on May 29 to expand the nuclear data-center developer’s board and elect himself and several additional directors.

title: Anthropic Unveils AI Agents to Field Financial Services Tasks
title_cn: Anthropic 推出人工智能代理来执行金融服务任务
summary: Anthropic PBC unveiled a set of new artificial intelligence agents designed to handle a broader mix of financial services tasks, part of the company’s push to win over Wall Street.

title_cn: 里夫斯、裂痕和产量上升
summary: The economic fallout from war on Iran is testing the relationship between the UK Chancellor and US Treasury Secretary

title_cn: iHeart 债权人在经历艰难岁月后期待已久的回报
summary: An offer by Sirius XM could be a gamechanger for the radio stations owner

title: UK Borrowing Costs Rise to Highest Since 1998 In Test for Starmer
title_cn: Starmer 测试英国借贷成本升至 1998 年以来最高
summary: Get caught up.

title: UBS Withholding 22,000 Pages in Nazi Accounts Probe, Investigator Says
title_cn: 调查人员称，瑞银在纳粹账户调查中扣留了 22,000 个页面
summary: UBS Group AG is withholding more than 22,000 pages of documents from an independent probe into Credit Suisse’s handling of Nazi-linked accounts because the bank says they are legally privileged, the lawyer overseeing the investigation has told a US Senate committee.

summary: US and Zambia exchange jabs over corruption allegations.

title: EU Reaches Out to Anthropic Over Mythos AI Threat
title_cn: 欧盟就人工智能威胁神话向人类伸出援手
summary: Still-to-be-released model can identify flaws in IT systems, stoking fears about digital attacks

title: The Imperfect Lessons of North Korea’s Nukes
title_cn: 朝鲜核武器的不完美教训
summary: Pyongyang was able to develop nuclear weapons over several decades thanks to a massive conventional deterrent. It’s easy to see how Iran might wish it had done that too.

title: 1,550 Ships Trapped in Persian Gulf,  Trade Gap Widens, More
title_cn: 1,550艘船只被困波斯湾，贸易差距扩大，更多
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Vijay’s Tamil Nadu Win May Benefit Chandrababu Naidu’s Andhra Pradesh
title_cn: 维贾伊的泰米尔纳德邦胜利可能有利于钱德拉巴布·奈杜的安得拉邦
summary: Election surprise may impact the Tamil Nadu model.

title: EBay Can Give GameStop $56 Billion of Bad Feedback
title_cn: eBay 可能会给 GameStop 带来 560 亿美元的不良反馈
summary: GameStop Corp.’s attempted takeover of eBay Inc. — a company four times its size — looks like fantasy dealmaking even for a soar-away meme stock. EBay shouldn’t find it hard to reject the unwanted approach. But there’s an awkward challenge embedded in this outlandish bid that should put the online auctioneer under pressure all the same.

title: Votes and Verdicts: Proposed Ban on Institutional Home Ownership
title_cn: 投票与判决：禁止机构拥有住房的提议
summary: The Trump administration is seeking to ban large institutional investors from buying single-family homes to improve housing affordability. Proposed Senate legislation, part of the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, would allow limited exceptions for large investors planning major renovations and others who operate build-to-rent communities. In both cases, investors would have to sell the homes within seven years. Will this bill become law? What could it mean for companies that own single-family r

title: Talking Transports: DAT Sees Supply-Driven Freight Turn
title_cn: 谈论运输：DAT 看到供应驱动的货运转向
summary: Freight markets are tightening after a prolonged downturn, but the driver is shrinking capacity rather than rising demand. In this Talking Transports podcast, DAT Principal Analyst Dean Croke joins Bloomberg Intelligence senior transportation and logistics analyst Lee Klaskow to discuss how regulatory enforcement around driver qualifications, fraud and compliance is removing trucks from the market. Spot rates in some lanes are up 20–25% year over year, with truck postings down about 30% and load

title: Inside Active: Alger’s Crawford on Finding Durable Growth
title_cn: Inside Active：阿尔杰的克劳福德谈寻找持久增长
summary: Markets have recently been driven by a narrow set of AI-linked winners, but as these trends become widely recognized, the challenge is identifying what opportunities remain and what is already priced in. In this episode of Inside Active, host David Cohne, mutual fund and active management analyst at Bloomberg Intelligence, speaks with Dr. Ankur Crawford, executive vice president and portfolio manager at Alger, including the Alger Focus Equity Fund (ALGRX) and Alger Concentrated Equity ETF (CNEQ)

title: S&P 500 Is Poised for All-Time Highs as Oil Falls: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，标准普尔 500 指数有望创下历史新高：市场总结
summary: Relative calm returned to global markets, with stocks rising and oil falling as signs that a US-Iran ceasefire is still in place reduced fears about a full-scale war that could hamper the economic outlook.

title: Alphabet Returns to Euro Debt Market for Latest AI Megabond Deal
title_cn: Alphabet 重返欧元债券市场进行最新人工智能超级债券交易
summary: Alphabet Inc. needs to borrow heavily to fund investments in artificial intelligence, and it’s increasingly tapping every market to do so.

title: Macron Ally Moulin Named to Head France’s Central Bank
title_cn: 马克龙盟友穆兰被任命为法国央行行长
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron nominated Emmanuel Moulin, one of his closest advisers, to run the Bank of France.

title: Alphabet’s Record Canadian Debt Deal Weighs on Bond Spreads
title_cn: Alphabet 创纪录的加拿大债务交易令债券利差承压
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s C$8.5 billion ($6.24 billion) bond deal is driving corporate and provincial spreads wider in Canada as investors’ enthusiasm for the hyperscaler’s debt tests the market’s ability to absorb it.

title: Emerging Assets Erase Losses as Traders Cling to Fragile Truce
title_cn: 由于交易员坚持脆弱的休战协议，新兴资产消除了损失
summary: Currencies and stocks in the developing world erased losses from earlier in the session as fears of an escalation in the Middle East conflict eased, while high-yield borrowers continued to line up for global bond sales to take advantage of the improved risk appetite.

title: PayPal Plans to Cut 20% of Workforce as CEO Seeks to Revamp
title_cn: PayPal 计划裁员 20%，CEO 寻求重组
summary:
PayPal Holdings Inc. plans to cut around 20% of its workforce in the next two to three years, according to a person familiar with the matter, as new Chief Executive Officer Enrique Lores seeks to reduce costs and turn around the payments company.
PayPal employed around 23,800 people at the end of the year, meaning a workforce reduction of that size could eliminate more than 4,500 jobs. It’s part of the company’s plan to realize at least $1.5 billion in savings over the next two to three years, according to a statement Tuesday.  Bloomberg's Diksha Gera joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aluminum Jumps the Most in Three Weeks as US-Iran Truce Holds
title_cn: 随着美伊停战协议的达成，铝价三周内涨幅最大
summary: Aluminum jumped the most in three weeks along with other industrial metals as signs that a US-Iran ceasefire still holds reduced fears of a full-blown war that may drag down economic growth.

title: Wynn Weighs Delayed Opening of Its UAE Resort Due to Iran War
title_cn: 永利考虑因伊朗战争推迟其阿联酋度假村的开业
summary: Wynn Resorts Ltd. is considering postponing the expected opening date of its casino resort in the United Arab Emirates due to construction delays brought on by the US war with Iran, according to a person familiar with the company’s plans.

title: Canadian Gold Miner Halts Trading Again as Project Blocked
title_cn: 加拿大金矿公司因项目受阻再次停止交易
summary: Canada’s Goldquest Mining Corp. halted trading of its shares for a second time this week, after the Dominican Republic suspended operations at its Romero gold mine project in the wake of mass protests.

title: ECB Doesn’t See Enough Yet to Warrant Rate Hike, Villeroy Says
title_cn: 维勒罗伊表示，欧洲央行认为还没有足够的理由加息
summary: The European Central Bank doesn’t yet see enough impact on inflation from rising oil prices to prompt an increase in interest rates, outgoing Governing Council member Francois Villeroy de Galhau said.

title: ADM Sees Biofuels Policy, Renewed China Trade Boosting Profits
title_cn: ADM 认为生物燃料政策和恢复的中国贸易将提振利润
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Co. is seeing a brighter year ahead for crop trading, with clearer US biofuels policy and expectations for renewed soybean trade with China boosting results.

title: Larry Fink Says Futures of Compute Will Be New Asset Class
title_cn: 拉里·芬克表示计算的未来将成为新的资产类别
summary: BlackRock Chair and CEO Larry Fink suggests the demand for computing power is so large that a new asset class will spring up. He speaks at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Strategy Survives Another Bitcoin Crash With More Alchemy
title_cn: 策略通过更多炼金术在另一场比特币崩盘中幸存
summary: Michael Saylor’s Bitcoin accumulation firm Strategy Inc. has survived yet another crypto market meltdown with some fresh financial engineering.

title: US Stocks Rise With Eyes on Fragile Iran Ceasefire, AMD Results
title_cn: AMD 业绩展望脆弱的伊朗停火，美国股市上涨
summary: US stocks were on track to set a record high on Tuesday as the US-Iran ceasefire appeared to hold after clashes in the Strait of Hormuz and missile attacks against the United Arab Emirates raised tensions in the Gulf.

title: AEP Weighs Break From Two of America’s Biggest Power Grids
title_cn: AEP 面临与美国最大两个电网的决裂
summary: American Electric Power Co. is reviewing its memberships in two of the biggest US power networks after the utility’s top boss accused the grid operators of being too slow to connect data-center customers.

title: Goldman's Snider Sees 'Yellow Flags' in Equities
title_cn: 高盛的斯奈德认为股市出现“黄旗”
summary: Ben Snider, chief US equities strategist at Goldman Sachs Group Inc., says only a small number of stocks are driving the market to new highs. “If you look at the S&P 500, we’re at an all-time high, but the median stock in the index is still about 13% below its respective high,” Snider said Tuesday in an interview with Bloomberg Television.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: ECB’s Lagarde Urges Europe to Cut Reliance on Energy Imports
title_cn: 欧洲央行拉加德敦促欧洲减少对能源进口的依赖
summary: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde said soaring energy costs due to the Iran war should act as a wake-up call for Europe to reduce its reliance on fossil fuels and energy imports.

title: Debt Crisis Brews in Brazil as 8 Million Firms Miss Payments
title_cn: 巴西债务危机酝酿，800万家企业拖欠付款
summary: Take a glance at the stock market, and all appears well in the Brazilian economy. The Ibovespa has soared more than any other major index in the Americas over the past year — roughly 60% in dollar terms at last count.

title: Diamondback Sees 10% More Permian Oil Rigs by Year-End as War Boosts Prices
title_cn: 随着战争推高价格，响尾蛇预计到年底二叠纪石油钻井平台将增加 10%
summary: Diamondback Energy Inc., one of the biggest US shale producers, predicts that drillers will add as many as 30 rigs to America’s most prolific oil field by the end of the year as the Iran war sends crude prices soaring.

title: Ambev Soars Most Since 1999 as Brazil Beer Boosts Earnings
title_cn: 巴西啤酒带动盈利，Ambev 股价自 1999 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Shares of Ambev SA, the Brazilian unit of Anheuser-Busch InBev NV, soared the most in nearly 27 years after stronger-than-expected beer volumes in the South American nation drove a beat in first quarter earnings.

title: Oil Declines as Fragile Truce Holds Following Hormuz Clashes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突后脆弱的休战维持，油价下跌
summary: Oil edged lower as the four-week ceasefire in the Middle East held on Tuesday, after clashes in the Strait of Hormuz and strikes on the United Arab Emirates triggered a jump in prices a day earlier.

title: What It Will Take to Fix the Oil Market
title_cn: 如何修复石油市场
summary: The standoff in the Strait of Hormuz has removed millions of barrels of oil from markets, exposed stockpiles, spare capacity and even OPEC. Here's what would get the energy markets back on track. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Says Iran Ceasefire Still in Place After Clashes Over Hormuz
title_cn: 美国称伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡冲突后停火仍然有效
summary: The US played down the prospect of a return to active war with Iran after a day of clashes involving ships in the Strait of Hormuz and missile strikes against the United Arab Emirates.

title: US Bond Yield at 5% Highlights Mounting Pressure in Market
title_cn: 美国债券收益率达 5% 突显市场压力日益加大
summary: The yield on 30-year US government debt hovered around 5% after breaching the key level for the first time this year — suggesting pressure in the world’s biggest bond market isn’t letting up.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/5/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 5 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alabbar: Dubai Property Market Resilient Amid War Turmoil
title_cn: 阿拉巴尔：迪拜房地产市场在战争动荡中保持弹性
summary:
Emaar Properties founder Mohamed Alabbar says that Dubai’s property market remains resilient despite regional tensions, citing strong buyer confidence and stable collections across customers. While acknowledging short-term supply chain disruptions linked to the Strait of Hormuz closure, Alabbar expects a quick regional rebound. He spoke with Bloomberg TV's Joumanna Bercetche from the sidelines of MIITE in Abu Dhabi.

(Corrects title of guest in video description.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Carlyle’s $5B Private Equity Shakeup
title_cn: 凯雷 50 亿美元私募股权重组
summary: Carlyle Co-President John Redett joins Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Milken Conference to break down a $5B liquidity strategy that aims to reshape private equity. He explains what’s really behind the industry’s exit slowdown, and pushes back on the AI investment frenzy saying diversification wins over hype. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK to Introduce 12-Month Treasury Bills to Broaden Debt Market
title_cn: 英国将推出 12 个月期国库券以扩大债务市场
summary: The UK will begin selling 12-month Treasury bills at its weekly auctions, as part of the government’s efforts to tilt its borrowing toward shorter-maturity debt.

title: Inflationary Signals Are Popping up Everywhere
title_cn: 通胀信号无处不在
summary: It’s not just the US.

title: New World Weighs Sale of Stake in $2 Billion Hotel Portfolio
title_cn: 新世界考虑出售价值 20 亿美元酒店组合的股份
summary: New World Development Co., the cash-strapped property developer, is in talks to sell its 50% stake in a portfolio of three Hong Kong hotels valued at $2 billion, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Apple Explores Intel and Samsung as TSMC Backup
title_cn: 苹果探索英特尔和三星作为台积电后备
summary:
Apple is exploring using Intel and Samsung to produce chips for devices in the US — as a backup to longtime partner TSMC.

Peter Elstrom explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Finnish Satellite Startup Iceye in Talks to Raise €250 Million
title_cn: 芬兰卫星初创公司 Iceye 正在洽谈融资 2.5 亿欧元
summary: Iceye, the Finnish satellite startup tapping into increased defense spending in Europe, is in talks to raise €250 million ($293 million) in a round that may nearly double its previous valuation, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: AI Cloud Provider Lambda Taps Former Sprint CEO as New Leader
title_cn: AI 云提供商 Lambda 任命前 Sprint 首席执行官为新领导者
summary: Lambda Inc., an AI cloud-computing provider backed by Nvidia Corp., named Sprint veteran Michel Combes as its next chief executive officer, part of a management overhaul aimed at positioning the startup for growth.

title: Blackstone, KKR in Talks With Google to Bring AI Models to Portfolio Firms
title_cn: Blackstone、KKR 正在与 Google 洽谈将人工智能模型引入投资组合公司
summary: Blackstone Inc. and KKR & Co. are in talks with Alphabet Inc. to give the companies they own access to Google’s artificial intelligence models, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Mnuchin Talks Semiannual Reporting, AI and Fed Rates
title_cn: 姆努钦谈论半年度报告、人工智能和美联储利率
summary: Steven Mnuchin, founder of Liberty Strategic Capital and former US Treasury Secretary, says he supports the proposal released by the Securities and Exchange Commission that will allow US companies to choose to report earnings semiannually. Speaking at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California, Mnuchin also comments on the economic impact of AI, the conflict in Iran, the federal budget deficit and Federal Reserve monetary policy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Coinbase to Cut 14% of Staff, Citing Volatile Markets and AI
title_cn: Coinbase 以动荡的市场和人工智能为由裁员 14%
summary: Crypto exchange Coinbase Global Inc. will cut around 14% of its workforce, citing a need to manage costs in volatile markets and technological advances in artificial intelligence. Around 700 employees will be affected by the changes, with cuts expected to happen mostly in the second quarter, and the company expects to incur as much as $60 million in restructuring expenses. Bloomberg's Paul Gulbberg joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Palantir’s Miss on US Commercial Sales Outshadows Higher Outlook
title_cn: Palantir 在美国商业销售上的失误掩盖了更高的前景
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. reported disappointing US commercial sales in the first quarter, outshadowing what was an otherwise bullish outlook for the polarizing company at the nexus of debates over surveillance and artificial intelligence-enabled warfare.

title: Former Citadel CTO Joins Motive Partners
title_cn: 前 Citadel 首席技术官加入 Motive Partners
summary: Citadel’s former Chief Technology Officer Umesh Subramanian is joining private investment firm Motive Partners, where he will lead its artificial-intelligence push. Subramanian and Motive's founder Rob Heyvaert speak to Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Milken Global Conference.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Shopify Drops as Outlook Implies Slower Growth, Rising Costs
title_cn: Shopify 下跌，因为展望意味着增长放缓、成本上升
summary: Shopify Inc. shares slumped as the company’s outlook suggests its revenue growth pace may be slowing, while higher costs may dampen second-quarter profitability.

title: JPMorgan's Aiyengar Says Clients Are Going for Bigger Deals
title_cn: 摩根大通的艾扬格表示，客户正在寻求更大的交易
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Anu Aiyengar, global head of advisory and M&A, speaks to Bloomberg's Dani Burger at the Milken Conference in Beverly Hills. She says dealmaking was "challenging" in April due to Iran war, but she says clients are still looking for big deals.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Is Trusting Bots With Biggest Corporate Bond Trades
title_cn: 华尔街信任机器人进行最大的公司债券交易
summary: Wall Street securities dealers and money managers are increasingly relying on algorithms to execute even the biggest corporate-bond trades, the latest sign of movement toward electronic trading in a $12 trillion market that was long one of the biggest holdouts.

title: EQT CEO: Scale Wins in AI Era
title_cn: 殷拓集团CEO：人工智能时代规模制胜
summary: EQT’s CEO Per Franzen joins Dani Burger at the Milken Conference to break down how AI is reshaping private markets. He reveals why scale is now essential, how EQT is investing in AI infrastructure, and why the future belongs to firms that can balance internal expertise with external partnerships. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Slok Sees Best Aspects of ‘China Shock’ in AI Impact
title_cn: Apollo 的 Slok 看到了人工智能影响中“中国冲击”的最佳方面
summary: Torsten Slok, chief economist at Apollo Global Management, expects that productivity gains from artificial intelligence will probably result in more jobs being created than are lost, similar to the effects after China joined the World Trade Organization.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SAP Plans to Expand AI Access to Customers Who Don’t Use Cloud
title_cn: SAP 计划向不使用云的客户扩展 AI 访问权限
summary: SAP SE is planning to expand access to its artificial intelligence solutions to some customers who haven’t moved their systems to its cloud services, people familiar with the matter said, a strategic shift prioritizing the newer technology as the race to keep customers away from rivals heats up.

title: Apple Explores Using Intel and Samsung to Build Main Device Chips in the US
title_cn: 苹果探索使用英特尔和三星在美国制造主要设备芯片
summary: Apple Inc. has held exploratory discussions about using Intel Corp. and Samsung Electronics Co. to produce the main processors for its devices in the US, a move that would offer a secondary option beyond longtime partner Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.

title: France Unveils Rules to Reduce Reliance on China for Rare Earths
title_cn: 法国出台规则减少对中国稀土的依赖
summary: France announced fresh measures to curb reliance on Chinese rare earths in a move to safeguard industries ranging from consumer electronics to electric cars and offshore wind.

title: Duke Energy Beats on Profits and Revenue, But Is Not Raising Guidance
title_cn: 杜克能源公司的利润和收入表现良好，但并未提高指引
summary: Duke Energy’s CFO Brian Savoy joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down a strong earnings beat and explains why the company isn’t raising guidance yet. He reveals how AI data center demand is reshaping the power grid. He says the real edge is Duke's  “speed to power” strategy that gets customers online years faster while managing grid strain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AMD Shares ‘Priced for Perfection’ After Best Month in 25 Years
title_cn: AMD 股价在经历 25 年来最好的一个月后“定价完美”
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. is coming off its best month in the stock market since the dot-com era, and with the chipmaker’s first-quarter earnings due after the bell, investors will get a chance to see whether its shares have gotten ahead of its fundamentals.

title: Apollo’s Slok Likens AI Impact to Best Aspects of ‘China Shock’
title_cn: Apollo 的 Slok 将人工智能的影响比作“中国冲击”的最佳方面
summary: Productivity gains from artificial intelligence will probably result in more jobs being created than are lost, similar to what occurred after China joined the World Trade Organization, according to Torsten Slok of Apollo Global Management Inc.

title: Jamie Foxx, Squid Game Creator Invest in AI Startup ElevenLabs
title_cn: Squid 游戏创始人 Jamie Foxx 投资人工智能初创公司 ElevenLabs
summary: Artificial intelligence developer ElevenLabs has brought on a wave of new investors including BlackRock Inc., Nvidia Corp., actors Jamie Foxx and Eva Longoria, and Hwang Dong-hyuk, the creator of the hit series Squid Game.

title: Former Trump NASA Head Bridenstine to Lead Startup Quantum Space
title_cn: 特朗普前美国宇航局局长布里登斯汀将领导量子空间初创公司
summary: Former NASA administrator Jim Bridenstine is joining Quantum Space, a startup developing maneuverable spacecraft for defense missions, as chief executive officer, the company said on Tuesday.

title: Ford’s $30,000 Electric Pickup Aims to Win Over Skeptical Buyers
title_cn: 福特售价 30,000 美元的电动皮卡旨在赢得持怀疑态度的买家
summary: Everything about Ford Motor Co.’s Long Beach, California, “skunkworks” operation was designed so that its crack engineering team could dream up a new electric vehicle lineup that broke with convention. And yet after years of tinkering, the automaker is aiming to reinvent a form it didn’t get right the first time: the pickup truck.

title: Private Credit to Keep Growing, Moody's Pinto Says
title_cn: 穆迪平托表示私人信贷将继续增长
summary: Moody’s Marc Pinto says private credit has proven resilient through a recent liquidity crunch, with software-heavy BDC portfolios holding up and troubled borrowers still low at around 0.5%. Pinto, the Global Head of Private Credit at Moody's Ratings, says the sector should continue expanding, though elevated redemptions are likely through year-end before stabilising closer to 5%. Pinto discussed the outlook on Bloomberg The Opening Trade with Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bose Challenges Sonos with $299 Alexa+ Speaker and $1,099 Soundbar
title_cn: Bose 以 299 美元的 Alexa+ 扬声器和 1,099 美元的 Soundbar 挑战 Sonos
summary: Bose Corp. announced a trio of products under a new “Lifestyle Collection” that’s intended to meld the company’s audio technologies and innovative engineering with elegant hardware, pitting it against familiar rivals like Sonos Inc. and Apple Inc.

title: Prysmian Shares Rise on CEO's €4 Billion M&A Comments
title_cn: 普睿司曼股价因首席执行官 40 亿欧元并购言论而上涨
summary: Italian cable maker Prysmian is scouting the market for a potential acquisition, Chief Executive Officer Massimo Battaini told Bloomberg TV on Tuesday. Potential targets could be similar in size to Encore Wire — acquired in 2024 — with an enterprise value of around €4 billion ($4.68 billion). Battaini spoke on "The Pulse with Francine Lacqua" on Bloomberg TV. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Backs QuantWare, a Dutch Startup Making Quantum Computing Chips
title_cn: 英特尔支持荷兰一家生产量子计算芯片的初创公司 QuantWare
summary: Dutch startup QuantWare is raising €152 million ($178 million) in a round led by Intel Corp.’s venture capital arm to build a production facility for quantum computing processors.

title: Google, Microsoft to Give US Agency Early Access to AI Models
title_cn: 谷歌和微软将让美国机构抢先使用人工智能模型
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google, Microsoft Corp. and xAI have agreed to give the US government early access to their artificial intelligence models to assess the systems’ capabilities and help improve their security before the technology is released to the public.

title: US Army Wants Its Weapons Systems to Talk to Each Other
title_cn: 美国陆军希望其武器系统能够相互通信
summary: Army Secretary Dan Driscoll is assembling top defense contractors as well as Palantir Technologies Inc. and Anduril Industries Inc. in a bid to get their weapons to communicate better with each other and to more closely integrate AI.

title: Trump Says US Has 'Total Control' Over Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 特朗普称美国“完全控制”霍尔木兹海峡
summary: President Donald Trump says the US has "total control" of the Strait of Hormuz and Iran wants to make a deal to end the war. He speaks in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How the Strait of Hormuz Has Become a Weapon of War
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡如何成为战争武器
summary: No region of the world produces more oil and gas than the countries straddling the Persian Gulf. Most of this energy can only be exported aboard tankers that cross the Strait of Hormuz — a waterway that’s effectively been blocked for more than two months.

title: SEC Unveils Plan to Let Companies Move to Semiannual Reports
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会公布让公司转向半年度报告的计划
summary: US companies could choose to report earnings semiannually instead of quarterly under a proposal released by the Securities and Exchange Commission, potentially reducing how much information publicly traded firms must share with investors.

title: SEC Unveils Proposal for Semiannual Reporting
title_cn: SEC 公布半年度报告提案
summary: US companies could choose to report earnings semiannually instead of quarterly under a proposal released by the Securities and Exchange Commission. Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean has more on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Kirishi Refinery, Oil Station
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯基里什炼油厂和油站
summary: Ukraine said that it hit a Russian export-oriented refinery and oil-pumping station in Kirishi near the Baltic coast, as Kyiv ramps up attacks ahead of planned Victory Day ceasefires.

title: South Africa Moves to Quell Fallout From Anti-Immigrant Attacks
title_cn: 南非采取行动平息反移民袭击的影响
summary: South Africa’s foreign ministry is stepping up diplomatic efforts to quell growing concern on the continent about rising anti-immigrant sentiment in the country.

title: EU Tells US Trade Deal Should be Adopted by July Deadline
title_cn: 欧盟告诉美国贸易协议应在七月截止日期前通过
summary: The European Union wants the main parts of a US trade deal adopted by July, as it pushed Washington to respect previous commitments made under the pact.

title: Trump Says Xi Has Been ‘Respectful’ on Iran, Downplaying Strains
title_cn: 特朗普称习近平对伊朗“尊重”，淡化紧张局势
summary: US President Donald Trump said he would discuss the Iran war with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping during their summit next week and sought to downplay tensions over the conflict.

title: FAA Proposes Limits on Drone Flights to Address Security Worries
title_cn: 美国联邦航空局提议限制无人机飞行以解决安全担忧
summary: The Trump administration is proposing rules to tighten security against rogue drone flights.

title: Magyar Warns Late Orban Spree Endangers Hungary’s Budget
title_cn: 马扎尔警告奥尔班狂欢已晚会危及匈牙利的预算
summary: Hungary’s incoming prime minister and two central bankers warned Tuesday on the risk of overspending as Viktor Orban prepares to hand over government at the end of this week.

title: Romanian Government Falls, Sowing Doubts Over Fiscal Reforms
title_cn: 罗马尼亚政府垮台，财政改革引发质疑
summary: Romania’s government collapsed after losing a no-confidence vote, triggering challenging talks over a new cabinet that’s needed to safeguard efforts to rein in the European Union’s widest budget deficit.

title: India Clears Loan Guarantee Plan as War Hurts Firms, Airlines
title_cn: 由于战争损害了企业和航空公司，印度批准了贷款担保计划
summary: India’s federal cabinet on Tuesday approved a credit guarantee plan with capital allocation of 181 billion rupees ($1.9 billion) to help businesses and airlines cushion the impact of the war in Iran.

title: Russia Court Orders State Seizure of Agriculture Tycoon’s Empire, RBC Says
title_cn: 加拿大皇家银行称，俄罗斯法院下令国家没收农业大亨的帝国
summary: A Moscow court ordered the nationalization of billionaire Vadim Moshkovich’s stake in agricultural business Ros Agro Plc after prosecutors filed an anti-corruption lawsuit against him, according to local media outlet RBC.

title: Vornado CEO Appeals to Mamdani After Mayor’s Griffin ‘Blunder’
title_cn: 市长格里芬“失误”后，沃纳多首席执行官向马姆达尼提出上诉
summary: Vornado Realty Trust Chief Executive Officer Steven Roth said he’s begging Zohran Mamdani to be more welcoming to businesses after a video by the New York City mayor caused Citadel to threaten to pull out of a new tower on Park Avenue.

title: Secret Service Officers Shoot Gunman Near the White House
title_cn: 特勤人员在白宫附近射杀枪手
summary: A man was shot by Secret Service officers near the White House Monday afternoon after agents spotted him carrying a concealed firearm and he opened fire, according to the agency’s deputy director.

title: Carney Appoints Former Supreme Court Judge Louise Arbour as Governor General
title_cn: 卡尼任命前最高法院法官路易斯·阿尔伯为总督
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney has appointed Louise Arbour, a former Supreme Court judge who held several top roles at the United Nations, as Canada’s next governor general.

title: Portugal to Propose Energy Windfall Tax as War Raises Bills
title_cn: 由于战争导致账单增加，葡萄牙将提议征收能源暴利税
summary: Portugal plans to push ahead with a proposal to impose a windfall tax on energy companies to help cushion the fallout from spiraling costs for consumers and companies caused by the Iran war.

title: A Probe of Trump Foes Upends Justice Department Hub in Miami
title_cn: 对特朗普敌人的调查颠覆了迈阿密司法部中心
summary: Shortly after ascending to the top of the Justice Department last month, Todd Blanche gathered prosecutors in Miami to press for results from a highly sensitive probe into some of President Donald Trump’s perceived political enemies.

title: Cash Is Back in Russia as Internet Blackouts Hit Payments
title_cn: 由于互联网停电影响支付，现金又回到了俄罗斯
summary: Cash is making a comeback in Russia as digital payments grow more unreliable with frequent mobile internet outages the Kremlin says are aimed at countering the threat of Ukrainian drone attacks.

title: Senate GOP Seeks $1 Billion for Secret Service, Trump Ballroom
title_cn: 参议院共和党寻求 10 亿美元用于特勤局和特朗普宴会厅
summary: A top Senate Republican has proposed spending as much as $1 billion for US Secret Service security adjustments and upgrades, including for President Donald Trump’s planned White House ballroom.

title: Russia Boosts Oil Exports as Value Spikes to Ukraine-War High
title_cn: 随着价值飙升至乌克兰战争高点，俄罗斯增加了石油出口
summary: Value of shipments hit the highest since the conflict began on higher flows, prices

title: Modi’s Rival Rejects Loss, Alleges Rigged Poll in Key State
title_cn: 莫迪的竞争对手否认失败，声称关键邦的民意调查被操纵
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s rival Mamata Banerjee refused to resign as West Bengal’s chief minister a day after she was defeated by the ruling party in state elections, alleging the polls were manipulated.

title: Trump to Sign Memo Bringing Back Presidential Fitness Test Award
title_cn: 特朗普将签署备忘录恢复总统体能测试奖
summary: President Donald Trump is slated to sign a memorandum Tuesday that brings back the Presidential Fitness Test Award, according to a White House official, part of a broader effort by the administration to revamp US public health policies.

title: The Ceasefire is Not Over With Iran Says Hegseth
title_cn: 赫格斯称伊朗停火尚未结束
summary:
US Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth said the US will maintain its “ironclad” blockade of Iranian ships in the Strait of Hormuz during a press briefing at the Pentagon.  The US played down the prospect of a return to active war with Iran after a day of clashes involving ships in the Strait of Hormuz and missile strikes against the United Arab Emirates.
Attacks by Tehran on vessels in the Persian Gulf and the UAE didn’t constitute a breach of a ceasefire, General Dan Caine, the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, told reporters at the Pentagon on Tuesday. Speaking alongside him, Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed the truce that began just under a month ago is still in place.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Japan, Philippines Finalizing Transfer of Destroyer Escorts
title_cn: 日本与菲律宾完成驱逐舰护航移交
summary: Japan and the Philippines are finalizing the details of the transfer of Japanese Abukuma-class destroyer escorts, as both countries seek to boost naval cooperation amid maritime territorial disputes with Beijing, the countries’ defense chiefs said.

title: Reeves Enjoys Good Ties With Bessent, UK Says After Clash Over Iran
title_cn: 英国在伊朗冲突后表示，里夫斯与贝森特关系良好
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves enjoys a “good relationship” with her US counterpart Scott Bessent, a spokesman for the UK government said following a Financial Times report that the two finance ministers argued in Washington last month.
